readme_documentation_comments: The documentation in the README file is good, but it could be more detailed. Here are some strengths and weaknesses:
commit_activity_comments: 3 - Commits every week. Weekly development summary: Week of 2025-09-01: This week, a new Admin Module was added to the system, allowing for administrators to manage doctors and oversee the system. Existing features were also improved with the recreation of the Backend in a modular style for simplified maintainability. Additionally, Medseal was made installable as a PWA app, enhancing its user experience.; Week of 2025-09-08: This week, the development team made significant improvements to the admin dashboard, doctor dashboard, and NGO dashboard, adding features for analytics and case management. The team also added a new Ngo Module for user type and patient case management, including fund request capabilities. Overall, these changes aim to enhance the system's functionality and usability for administrators and users.; Week of 2025-09-15: Several features were improved this week to enhance user accessibility, including upgrades to the verification flow and prescription accessibility. The Patient Case Tracker also received a fix. These changes aim to provide a better user experience for patients and medical staff.
